author: Netflix Anime
text:
Golden Kamuy -The Abashiri Prison Raid- | Official Trailer | Netflix
Golden Kamuy - The Abashiri Prison Raid -
Coming July 13 Only on Netflix
https://www.netflix.com/title/82116953

An ironclad fortress. Armed guards. 700 vicious criminals. Can Sugimoto and Asirpa break into Japan's most escape-proof prison — and get out alive?
Find out in this action-packed film, and third-part of the live action Golden Kamuy series, coming exclusively on Netflix on July 13!

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/33okaL0

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

Golden Kamuy - The Abashiri Prison Raid - | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@netflixanime

In a fierce three-way fight over a hoard of Ainu gold, Asirpa and Sugimoto head to Abashiri Prison, where Noppera-Bo and the truth about her father wait.
